description: A junior aerospace engineer at a general aviation OEM must build a baseline parametric OpenVSP model for a new aircraft concept based on a wing specification document left by the chief designer. The specification file is located at /home/ga/Desktop/wing_spec.txt. Read that file first to obtain the required wing geometry parameters. Then, in OpenVSP, create a new model containing: (1) a Wing component with total span, root chord, tip chord, dihedral, and sweep set according to the specification, and (2) a Fuselage (Pod) component to represent the aircraft body. Save the completed model to /home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/concept_wing.vsp3. The specification uses metric units (meters and degrees).
